## Type of Change

<!-- Mark the relevant option with an "x" -->

- [ ] 🐛 **Fix** — Bug or regression fix (`fix:`)

- [ ] 🧠 **Refactor** — Code improvement without functional change (`refactor:`)
- [ ] 🧾 **Docs** — Documentation only (`docs:`)
